messages.text: Hey team, kicking off the engineering deploy planning thread for next week.
I drafted the rollback strategy for the deploy. Will share notes shortly.
Great. We should also discuss the migration scripts engineering needs.
Noted. The migration script for users table is the riskiest piece.
Yes. I will pair with Carol on the engineering deploy steps.
Sounds good. We can do a dry run on staging before the deploy.
Adding a checklist to the engineering wiki tonight.
Perfect, thanks. I will review and add comments.
Engineering deploy postmortem question: what is our rollback signal?
Alright, picking the engineering deploy thread back up after the break.
I tested the migration scripts on staging. Looks clean.
Excellent. Let us schedule the deploy window for Thursday.
Thursday at 4pm UTC works for me. Engineering oncall is Carol that week.
Perfect. I will lock the deploy slot and notify the engineering channel.
Thanks. Lets keep this engineering deploy thread open until Friday.
